requirements.description_en: This chapter is automatically added to the quest list when the game starts.
requirements.description_ko: 이 챕터는 게임 시작 시 퀘스트 목록에 자동으로 추가됩니다.
requirements.description_ja: このチャプターはゲーム開始時にクエストリストに自動的に追加されます。

objectives.description_en: Escape Ground Zero
objectives.description_ja: Ground Zeroから脱出する

objectives.description_en: Talk to Therapist
objectives.description_ja: Therapistと話す

objectives.description_en: Ensure access to the Streets of Tarkov
objectives.description_ja: Streets of Tarkovへのアクセスを確保する

children.description_en: Hand over the cash to Therapist

texts.description_en: Reward: Streets of Tarkov location unlock.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 타르코프 시내 지역 잠금 해제.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：Streets of Tarkovエリア解放。

objectives.description_en: Talk to Ragman
objectives.description_ja: Ragmanと話す

objectives.description_en: Survive and extract or visit Interchange 3 times
objectives.description_ja: Interchangeで生き残って脱出するか、3回訪問する

objectives.description_en: Tell Ragman what you found during the recon
objectives.description_ko: 정찰 중 발견한 것을 래그맨에게 보고하세요.
objectives.description_ja: 偵察中に見つけたものをRagmanに報告する

texts.description_en: Reward: Skier trader unlock, Customs location unlock.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 스키어 상인 잠금 해제, 세관 지역 잠금 해제.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：Skierトレーダー解放、Customsエリア解放。

objectives.description_en: Talk to Skier
objectives.description_ja: Skierと話す

objectives.description_en: Survive and extract or visit Customs 3 times
objectives.description_ja: Customsで生き残って脱出するか、3回訪問する

objectives.description_en: Hand over any 5 found in raid building materials items to Skier
objectives.description_ko: 레이드에서 발견한 건축 자재 아이템 5개를 스키어에게 전달하세요.
objectives.description_ja: インレイドで見つけた建築資材アイテム5個をSkierに渡す

children.description_en: (Optional) Find any 5 items in raid from the building materials category
children.description_ko: (선택) 레이드에서 건축 자재 카테고리 아이템 5개를 찾으세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）建築資材カテゴリーのアイテムをインレイドで5個見つける

texts.description_en: Reward: Mechanic trader unlock, Factory location unlock.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 메카닉 상인 잠금 해제, 공장 지역 잠금 해제.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：Mechanicトレーダー解放、Factoryエリア解放。

objectives.description_en: Talk to Mechanic
objectives.description_ja: Mechanicと話す

objectives.description_en: Survive and extract or visit Factory 3 times
objectives.description_ja: Factoryで生き残って脱出するか、3回訪問する

objectives.description_en: Hand over any 2 found in raid weapons to Mechanic
objectives.description_ja: インレイドで見つけた武器2つをMechanicに渡す

children.description_ja: （任意）武器をインレイドで2つ見つける

texts.description_en: Reward: Prapor trader unlock, Woods location unlock.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 프라퍼 상인 잠금 해제, 삼림 지역 잠금 해제.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：Praporトレーダー解放、Woodsエリア解放。

objectives.description_en: Talk to Skier
objectives.description_ja: Skierと話す

objectives.description_en: Eliminate any 3 targets on Woods
objectives.description_ja: Woodsでターゲットを3人排除する

objectives.description_en: Survive and extract or visit Woods 3 times
objectives.description_ja: Woodsで生き残って脱出するか、3回訪問する

texts.description_en: Reward: Peacekeeper trader unlock, Shoreline location unlock.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 피스키퍼 상인 잠금 해제, 해안선 지역 잠금 해제.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：Peacekeeperトレーダー解放、Shorelineエリア解放。

objectives.description_en: Locate the entrance to the port Terminal
objectives.description_ja: 港のTerminalの入り口を特定する

objectives.description_en: Find a way to contact the soldiers at the Terminal
objectives.description_ko: Terminal에 있는 병사들과 접촉할 방법을 찾으세요.
objectives.description_ja: Terminalにいる兵士と接触する方法を見つける

objectives.description_en: Use the intercom to contact the port garrison
objectives.description_ja: インターホンを使用して港の駐屯地と接触する

objectives.description_en: Learn how to escape Tarkov
objectives.description_ja: Tarkovからの脱出方法を学ぶ

objectives.description_en: Ensure access to Lighthouse
objectives.description_ja: Lighthouseへのアクセスを確保する

objectives.description_en: Ensure access to Reserve
objectives.description_ja: Reserveへのアクセスを確保する

children.description_en: Hand over 5 found in raid PMC dogtags to Prapor
children.description_ko: 레이드에서 발견한 PMC 인식표 5개를 프라퍼에게 전달하세요.
children.description_ja: インレイドで見つけたPMCドッグタグ5個をPraporに渡す
（任意）PMCドッグタグをインレイドで5個見つける

children.description_en: Survive and extract or visit Shoreline 3 times
children.description_ja: Shorelineで生き残って脱出するか、3回訪問する

objectives.description_en: Ensure access to The Lab
objectives.description_ja: The Labへのアクセスを確保する

children.description_ja: TerraGroupの秘密施設にアクセスする

children.description_en: (Optional) Obtain a keycard or access codes to enter the facility
children.description_ko: (선택) 시설 입장을 위한 키카드 또는 액세스 코드를 획득하세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）施設に入るためのキーカードまたはアクセスコードを入手する

item.name_ja: TerraGroup Labs アクセスキーカード

children.description_en: (Optional) Locate the entrance to the facility on Factory
children.description_ja: （任意）Factoryで施設への入り口を特定する

children.description_en: (Optional) Locate the entrance to the facility on Streets of Tarkov
children.description_ja: （任意）Streets of Tarkovで施設への入り口を特定する

children.description_en: Search the top management offices in The Lab
children.description_ja: The Labのトップマネジメントオフィスを探索する

children.description_en: Search the server room in The Lab
children.description_ja: The Labのサーバー室を探索する

children.description_en: Locate the escape path through the drainage system in The Lab
children.description_ko: 연구소의 배수 시스템을 통한 탈출로를 찾으세요.
children.description_ja: The Labの排水システムを通る脱出路を特定する

texts.description_en: Reward: The Lab location unlock, Pathfinder achievement unlocked.
texts.description_ko: 보상: 연구소 지역 잠금 해제, Pathfinder 업적 달성.
texts.description_ja: 報酬：The Labエリア解放、Pathfinder実績解除。
